chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 603 of 2024 (Fakhar Ali v. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 26.04.2024 Mr. Allah Bakhsh Narejo, advocate for the applicant Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ----------------------------------- It is alleged that the applicant with the rest of the culprits robbed complainant Saad Jamal and his witnesses of their cell phones and other belongings, and for that, the present case was registered. The applicant having been refused bail by learned Sessions Judge, Karachi, East has sought the same from this Court by way of instant bail application under Section 497 Cr.P.C. Heard arguments and perused the record. The name and description of the applicant are not disclosed in the FIR, though it is lodged with a delay of about one day. The applicant has not been subjected to an identification parade through the Magistrate. The robbed cell phones are alleged to have been foisted upon the applicant by the police. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on point of further inquiry is made out. Under the given circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Nadir
